notes: Copilot fully integrated — status pills work for npm-installed Copilot, and the usage gauge reads its real quota. The rotating tip moved to the bottom bar's right end (and now survives ⌘B). Flatter top bar: one button shape, outlines only on hover. The Changes panel is now opened from the bottom bar's branch chip. Worktree creation grew a carried-files checklist (⌘⇧C). Sidebar header with 'add a project', and ⌘⌫ deletes a worktree.
